transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling RetailPlus customer support. My name is Sandra. How can I help you today?
Customer: Hi Sandra. I bought a jacket from your store two weeks ago and the zipper broke after the first wash. I want to return it.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that happened. That's definitely not the quality we expect from our products. Can I get your order number?
Customer: Sure, it's RP-78452.
Agent: Thank you. I can see your order here. The jacket was purchased on January 22nd. You're well within our 30-day return window. Was it purchased in-store or online?
Customer: It was in-store at the downtown location.
Agent: Perfect. You have two options — you can bring the jacket back to any store for a full refund, or I can email you a prepaid return label if you'd prefer to ship it back.
Customer: I'd prefer to ship it since the store is far from me.
Agent: Absolutely. I'll send a prepaid return label to the email on your account. Once we receive the jacket, your refund will be processed within 3-5 business days.
Customer: Will it go back to my credit card?
Agent: Yes, it will be refunded to the card you used for the original purchase.
Customer: That works. Can I also get a replacement instead of a refund?
Agent: Definitely. If you'd like an exchange, just let us know your preferred size and color when you drop off the return, or add a note to the return shipment.
Customer: I'll go with the refund for now. Thank you.
Agent: You're welcome. I've sent the return label to your email. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Customer: No, that's all. Thanks for the quick help.
Agent: My pleasure. Have a great day!
